creator: yanagisawa@csg.is.titech.ac.jp
text:
I also strongly need nvidia-driver.

The distinfo for 71xx and 96xx should be remained since
x11/nvidia-driver-71xx and x11/nvidia-driver-96xx import Makefile of
x11/nvidia-driver/.  The patch will be:
diff -ruN nvidia-driver.bak/Makefile nvidia-driver/Makefile
--- nvidia-driver.bak/Makefile  Mon Oct 15 14:44:31 2007
+++ nvidia-driver/Makefile      Mon Oct 15 14:45:12 2007
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=      nvidia-driver
-DISTVERSION?=  100.14.11
+DISTVERSION?=  100.14.19
 PORTREVISION?= 0                       # For consistency with slave
ports CATEGORIES=    x11 kld
 MASTER_SITES=  ${MASTER_SITE_NVIDIA}
diff -ruN nvidia-driver.bak/distinfo nvidia-driver/distinfo
--- nvidia-driver.bak/distinfo  Mon Oct 15 14:44:31 2007
+++ nvidia-driver/distinfo      Mon Oct 15 14:46:56 2007
@@ -4,6 +4,6 @@
 MD5 (NVIDIA-FreeBSD-x86-1.0-9639.tar.gz) =
2947394ea9f6a7f7dc6e5bcdd1f6e3db SHA256
(NVIDIA-FreeBSD-x86-1.0-9639.tar.gz) =
a661f039bd838605543a460769bd18a4296717878450eec4baecc6215b91a8a6 SIZE
(NVIDIA-FreeBSD-x86-1.0-9639.tar.gz) = 9668348 -MD5
(NVIDIA-FreeBSD-x86-100.14.11.tar.gz) =
af6f1764fd89177514a2b55d254a7730 -SHA256
(NVIDIA-FreeBSD-x86-100.14.11.tar.gz) =
8511656f042a4b2fc2ed5571a96a2b2972fe27961540e0e63d305aaa58753e42 -SIZE
(NVIDIA-FreeBSD-x86-100.14.11.tar.gz) = 11419761 +MD5
(NVIDIA-FreeBSD-x86-100.14.19.tar.gz) =
a124599d3ca8c2e2683472fde8fdbf64 +SHA256
(NVIDIA-FreeBSD-x86-100.14.19.tar.gz) =
c5a37e34266538b0ecfbbec95c7d5f9767e0d750cbf66a7cb54cc13895d601ad +SIZE
(NVIDIA-FreeBSD-x86-100.14.11.tar.gz) = 11146166

I have already tested this patch and it had worked well.

BTY, I found that this send-pr is the same as ports/117124.  Will
someone close one of them?

Thank you in advance,
Yoshisato YANAGISAWA.
